name: part_009
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa, and Mococo finish a performance on stage with a dance sequence.
An illustrated interlude featuring stylized versions of the performers.

scenes.song_name: Kyoushou Tricksters (狂笑トリックスターズ)

scenes.description: Story narration scene with skeletal and wolf-themed illustrations.
Performance of 'Nekuro no Hanayome' begins with Fubuki in a white dress costume.
scenes.song_name: Nekuro no Hanayome (ネクロの花嫁)

subtitles.original: トリック・オア・トリート！
subtitles.english: Trick or Treat!

subtitles.original: お菓子をくれても
subtitles.english: Even if you give me sweets...

subtitles.original: イタズラはしちゃうよ！
subtitles.english: ...I'll still play a trick!

subtitles.original:
狂笑トリックスターズ
作詞・作曲：OSTER project
subtitles.english:
Mad Laughter Tricksters
Lyrics/Composition: OSTER project

subtitles.original: ようこそ everyone みのけもよだつこの spooky night
subtitles.english: Welcome everyone to this hair-raising spooky night

subtitles.original: 腹の底まで揺れ kick & bass & hats & trumpet
subtitles.english: Shake to the bottom of your gut with kick, bass, hats, & trumpet

subtitles.original: ランタンと swingin' beat 赤い靴で踊り狂えば
subtitles.english: With lanterns and a swingin' beat, if you dance madly in red shoes

subtitles.original: 浮世の煩いも忘れられるでしょ
subtitles.english: You'll surely forget the troubles of this fleeting world

subtitles.original: 地も泥も巷じゃお化けよりも怖い人たち
subtitles.english: The people in the streets are scarier than ghosts

subtitles.original: 怯えさせちゃってすぐに 1 out, 2 out, 3 out, knockout
subtitles.english: Making them tremble, it's 1 out, 2 out, 3 out, knockout

subtitles.original: コンプライアンスも厳しい世の中ですが
subtitles.english: Even in this world where compliance is so strict

subtitles.original: 恐怖のリライト請け負います
subtitles.english: We'll take on the rewriting of your fears

subtitles.original: Give me a cherry pie それとも may I choke you up?
subtitles.english: Give me a cherry pie, or may I choke you up?

subtitles.original: Give me a flowy dress それとも may I stab you to death?
subtitles.english: Give me a flowy dress, or may I stab you to death?

subtitles.original: Poison, rope, hot and cake, knife, scissors, lovely flake
subtitles.english: Poison, rope, hot and cake, knife, scissors, lovely flake

subtitles.original: Choose one...
subtitles.english: Choose one...

subtitles.original: 「さぁ選んで」
subtitles.english: "Now, choose."

subtitles.original: なんちゃってドッキリ大成功
subtitles.english: Just kidding! Prank successful!

subtitles.original: 響くパンパカパンパンファンファーレで
subtitles.english: With a resounding fanfare of 'pan-paka-pan-pan'

subtitles.original: にっこり笑っちゃってハイポーズ
subtitles.english: Give a big smile and say 'Hi, pose!'

subtitles.original: あー怖かったなんて
subtitles.english: Saying 'Ah, that was scary'

subtitles.original: 座り込んで涙目で
subtitles.english: While sitting down with teary eyes

subtitles.original: 笑う顔見たいな
subtitles.english: I want to see your laughing face

subtitles.original: ちっちゃな箱の中のモンスターに怯えるくらいなら
subtitles.english: If you're going to be scared of monsters in a little box

subtitles.original: いつだってここにおいで
subtitles.english: Come here anytime

subtitles.original: もっとずっと本能的に楽しくなれる
subtitles.english: You can have much more instinctive fun

subtitles.original: 恐怖と踊っちゃおうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's dance with our fears

subtitles.original: 走想電移でキマってカタルシス
subtitles.english: Get high on catharsis through runaway thoughts

subtitles.original: もう一丁ジェットコースターでごきげんデトックス
subtitles.english: One more time, a cheery detox on a roller coaster

subtitles.original: 満月が暴く醜悪な本性
subtitles.english: The full moon exposes an ugly true nature

subtitles.original: デタラメに杖振り回し hocus pocus
subtitles.english: Waving a wand randomly, hocus pocus

subtitles.original: 劣等感を隠れ蓑に育つ呪いを
subtitles.english: Do you know how to pluck the curse

subtitles.original: 摘み取る術を知ってるかい？
subtitles.english: That grows under the cloak of inferiority?

subtitles.original: 「迷える哀れな仔羊たちよ」
subtitles.english: "O pitiful, lost little lambs,"

subtitles.original: 「お菓子が欲しいかい？それとも安らぎが欲しいかい？」
subtitles.english: "Do you want candy? Or do you want peace?"

subtitles.original: 「永遠に求め続けるの？」
subtitles.english: "Will you keep seeking it forever?"

subtitles.original: 「それならば、ずっと苦しいままだ」
subtitles.english: "If so, you will remain in pain forever."

subtitles.original: 「恐怖からの解放によって、」
subtitles.english: "If there is salvation to be achieved"

subtitles.original: 「成し得る救済があるのならば」
subtitles.english: "by being released from fear,"

subtitles.original: 「この目隠しはそのままに」
subtitles.english: "then let this blindfold remain."

subtitles.original: 「さぁ、イタズラ完了」
subtitles.english: "Now, the trick is complete."

subtitles.original: 永遠に断ち切れない呪いの鎖に囚われ
subtitles.english: Imprisoned by the chains of an unbreakable curse

subtitles.original: 朽ち果ててしまう前に
subtitles.english: Before you completely rot away

subtitles.original: 脳みそちょっといじるだけであら不思議
subtitles.english: Just a little tweak to the brain, and oh wonder

subtitles.original: こんなに気持ち良くて気分爽快
subtitles.english: It feels so good, it's totally refreshing

subtitles.original: なんちゃってドッキリ大成功
subtitles.english: Just kidding! Prank successful!

subtitles.original: 響くパンパカパンパンファンファーレで
subtitles.english: With a resounding fanfare of 'pan-paka-pan-pan'

subtitles.original: にっこり笑っちゃってハイポーズ
subtitles.english: Give a big smile and say 'Hi, pose!'

subtitles.original: あー怖かったなんて
subtitles.english: Saying 'Ah, that was scary'

subtitles.original: へたり込んで涙目で
subtitles.english: While slumping down with teary eyes

subtitles.original: 笑う顔いいな
subtitles.english: I like that laughing face

subtitles.original: もう苦しまなくていいよ こんなに頑張ったんだから
subtitles.english: You don't have to suffer anymore, you've worked so hard

subtitles.original: 躊躇わずこっちにおいで
subtitles.english: Don't hesitate, come this way

subtitles.original: もうずっと本能的に気持ちいいだけの
subtitles.english: I'll show you the goal

subtitles.original: ゴールを見せてあげる
subtitles.english: That's nothing but instinctive pleasure

subtitles.original: 混急急案でこそ光るカタルシス
subtitles.english: Catharsis shines through in urgent cases

subtitles.original: もう一丁全リセットで魂デトックス
subtitles.english: One more time, a soul detox with a total reset

subtitles.original: いつかの、あったかもしれない世界の出来事までも、
subtitles.english: Even the events of a world that might have once been...

subtitles.original: この冥界ではこうして思念として漂っているんだね。
subtitles.english: ...are floating here in this underworld as thoughts.

subtitles.original: あまり深入りしてはいけないよ、こういうのが一番質が悪い。
subtitles.english: Don't delve too deep. This kind of thing is the most troublesome.

subtitles.original: 私はただ、あなたを愛していただけ。
subtitles.english: I simply loved you.

subtitles.original: 物言わぬ唇に生気を吹き込んで、
subtitles.english: Breathing life into silent lips,

subtitles.original: 今宵「あなた」は甦る、
subtitles.english: Tonight, "you" shall be reborn,

subtitles.original: あの頃の姿で。
subtitles.english: as you were back then.

subtitles.original:
ネクロの花嫁
作詞・作曲：奏音69
subtitles.english:
The Necro-Bride
Lyrics/Composition: Kanon69
